name: Build Android APK

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main ]
  workflow_dispatch: {}

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout source
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up JDK 21
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: 'temurin'
          java-version: '21'

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '22'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm install

      - name: Use stable debug signing key
        run: |
          mkdir -p ~/.android
          cp debug.keystore ~/.android/debug.keystore

      - name: Prepare web assets
        run: |
          mkdir -p www
          cp index.html manifest.json sw.js icon-192.png icon-512.png www/

      - name: Add Android platform
        run: npx cap add android

      - name: Add VIBRATE permission
        run: sed -i 's/<application/<uses-permission android:name="android.permission.VIBRATE" \/>\n\n    <application/' android/app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml

      - name: Generate Android app icons from artwork
        run: npx @capacitor/assets generate --android

      - name: Sync Capacitor
        run: npx cap sync android

      - name: Build debug APK
        run: cd android && chmod +x gradlew && ./gradlew assembleDebug

      - name: Upload APK
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ca-app-debug-apk
          path: android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk
